ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) held its 72nd Annual General Meeting, where a significant total dividend of Rs. 206/- per equity share for FY2026 (Rs. 156 interim, Rs. 50 final) was proposed. The meeting addressed routine business, including the adoption of FY2026 financial statements, re-appointment of directors, and the appointment of Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP as statutory auditors for five years. A key takeaway and potential information gap is that the official voting results for all resolutions are pending and will be shared in due course, meaning the final approval of these items, particularly the substantial dividend, is not yet confirmed.
